forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. Southwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 78. North wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As twilight descends upon Boston, the atmosphere carries an intriguing blend of anticipation and calm. A soft, murky haze envelops the city, hinting at the possibility of rain, as the forecast suggests a 50% chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. With temperatures gracefully settling around a mild 62 degrees, tonight bears a cozy yet slightly unsettled quality. A gentle southwest breeze whispers through the trees, and while the clouds meander about, there’s a tangible sense that they hold stories of impending rain, possibly accumulating to a modest quarter of an inch. 

Looking ahead to Saturday, the forecast transitions toward a more amiable disposition, with only a slight chance of rain showers after the mid-morning hour. The day promises a radiant sun peeking through the clouds, with temperatures rising to a pleasant 78 degrees under a light north wind. Such a day invites leisurely strolls along the Esplanade or perhaps a quiet afternoon at a café, where one can savor the flavors of a summer's eve and watch the world go by. As the hours unfold, a pair of light layers will serve well—enough to ward off any residual chill of the night while allowing freedom and comfort in the warming air. This moment holds an unrefined charm; it beckons one to enjoy the simple joy of the changing seasons, perhaps with a book in hand or the laughter of friends nearby.
